name: Bistro Beef and Potatoes Maison
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Potatoes (2 medium), cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a shallow 1-quart microwave-safe dish. Cover with plastic wrap, venting one corner. Microwave on HIGH for 5 minutes until tender.
2. In a small bowl, thoroughly mix butter, cheese, rosemary, thyme, and pepper.
3. With an electric mixer, beat potatoes, 3 tablespoons of the butter-cheese mixture, and milk until smooth.
4. Heat olive oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Pan fry steaks to desired doneness, turning once.
5. Microwave potatoes on HIGH for 1 to 2 minutes until hot.
6. Top each steak with 1 1/2 teaspoons of the remaining butter-cheese mixture.
7. Serve with potatoes.
NOTE: Microwave cooking times are based on a 700-watt oven. Adjust cooking times to your own oven.
